steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank introduces the third sentence after two sentences that establish heavy adornments (25–50 lbs). The third sentence says the fabric was light and flexible. This is a contrast — the blank needs a contrast transition.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — On the other hand,: Signals contrast — the lightweight fabric directly contrasts the heavy adornments. ✓
  • Choice B — That is,: Signals a restatement or clarification, not a contrast. The two sentences say opposite things, not the same thing. ✗
  • Choice C — For instance,: Signals an example of the previous claim. But the previous claim is about heavy adornments, and lightweight fabric is not an example of that. ✗
  • Choice D — There,: A location adverb with no transitional function here. ✗
A is correct.
